nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 80. Southwest wind around 3 mph.

nws.name: Friday
nws.shortForecast: Mostly Sunny then Showers And Thunderstorms Likely
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely after 2pm. Mostly sunny. High near 95, with temperatures falling to around 90 in the afternoon. Heat index values as high as 106. Southwest wind 3 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
